entry.message: [info] Activation of plug-in DQC Rules Validator successful, version Check version using Tools->DQC->Version on the GUI or --dqc-version on the command line. - validate/DQC

[xule.otherTaxonomyLoadTime] Load taxonomy time 0:00:04.606864 from 'https://xbrl.fasb.org/us-gaap/2025/entire/us-gaap-entryPoint-std-2025.xsd' - http://www.sec.gov/Archives/edgar/data/1855509/000173112226000687/e7609_10-q.htm

[DQC.US.0204.10704] The concept us-gaap:AcquiredFiniteLivedIntangibleAssetsWeightedAverageUsefulLife with a value of P3Y has been used with the axis PropertyPlantAndEquipmentByTypeAxis and the member us-gaap:LeaseholdImprovementsMember. The concept us-gaap:AcquiredFiniteLivedIntangibleAssetsWeightedAverageUsefulLife should be used with the FiniteLivedIntangibleAssetsByMajorClassAxis or the IndefiniteLivedIntangibleAssetsByMajorClassAxis. Alternatively a different concept should be used to represent a line item associated with PPE.
Concept : us-gaap:AcquiredFiniteLivedIntangibleAssetsWeightedAverageUsefulLife Value : P3Y Period : 2026-01-01 to 2026-03-31 Dimensions : srt:RangeAxis=srt:MinimumMember, us-gaap:PropertyPlantAndEquipmentByTypeAxis=us-gaap:LeaseholdImprovementsMember
Rule Element Id:10704 Rule version: 30.0.0RC1 - e7609_10-q.htm 2998

The concept us-gaap:AcquiredFiniteLivedIntangibleAssetsWeightedAverageUsefulLife should be used with the FiniteLivedIntangibleAssetsByMajorClassAxis or the IndefiniteLivedIntangibleAssetsByMajorClassAxis. Rule Element Id:10704 Rule version: 30.0.0RC1 - e7609_10-q.htm 2992
